# intelligent agents (slashmantools.us)

> Free online tools plus two focused products: a production-ready Next.js SaaS
> boilerplate, and a Taiwan-stock ("台股") quantitative signal service. Built and
> run by an independent developer (slashman413). Also available for freelance work.

## Products
- [SaaS Starter](https://github.com/slashman413/saas-starter): Production-ready Next.js 16 multi-tenant B2B SaaS boilerplate — Auth.js v5, Prisma, RBAC, Stripe billing (production-grade webhook signature verification), API keys, audit logs, 1-click Vercel deploy. One-time $99. A free "Lite" edition (auth + multi-tenancy + RBAC) is available on GitHub.
- [TWSE Premium — 大飆股 DNA](https://slashmantools.us/hermes-twse-premium/): Daily Taiwan-stock quantitative signals from a 9-step swing-trading strategy, back-tested across 2004–2026 on the full market. Subscription from $49/month (monthly/quarterly/annual). zh-TW. Educational; not investment advice.

## Services (freelance / 接案)
- [Hire — smart home, SaaS, automation](https://slashmantools.us/services/): Home Assistant / ESP32 smart-home builds (mmWave presence, local-LLM voice, Frigate NVR, Zigbee/Xiaomi), Next.js SaaS MVP development, GitHub Actions automation, and custom data dashboards. Fixed-scope pricing.

## Finance content (free)
- [Strategy explainer](https://slashmantools.us/twse-backtests/strategy.html): Plain-language guide to the 9-step 大飆股 DNA quant strategy — market regime, entry signals, liquidity, scoring, exits. Educational, not investment advice.
- [Backtest dashboard](https://slashmantools.us/twse-backtests/): 2004–2026 year-by-year backtest dashboard with candlestick charts and technical indicators.
- [TW ETF dashboard](https://slashmantools.us/tw-etf-dashboard/dashboard.html): Multi-factor analysis of Taiwan ETF constituents (0050/0056/00878…).

## Free tools
- [LLM token & API cost calculator](https://slashmantools.us/token-cost-calculator/): Estimate tokens and compare GPT/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek API pricing. Embeddable.
- [Compound interest calculator](https://slashmantools.us/compound-calculator/): Recurring-investment / DCA growth projection with chart. Embeddable.
- [LLM VRAM calculator](https://slashmantools.us/llm-calc/), [more tools](https://slashmantools.us/tools/): calculators, dev tools, converters — free, client-side, no signup.
- [Cron Expression Generator](https://slashmantools.us/cron-expression-generator/): Build or decode crontab schedules — plain-English description + next run times. Free, in-browser.
- [YouTube Thumbnail Downloader](https://slashmantools.us/youtube-thumbnail-downloader/): Download HD/HQ/SD thumbnails from any YouTube video or Shorts link. Free, in-browser.
- [UTM Campaign URL Builder](https://slashmantools.us/utm-builder/): Add utm_source/medium/campaign parameters to any link for GA4 analytics tracking. Free, in-browser.

## Guides (developer + finance, free)
- [Best Next.js SaaS Boilerplates 2026 — honest comparison](https://slashmantools.us/blog/nextjs-saas-boilerplate-comparison/): ShipFast vs Makerkit vs Supastarter vs ixartz vs Vercel, by price and multi-tenancy, and how to choose.
- [Stripe subscriptions in Next.js (App Router)](https://slashmantools.us/blog/nextjs-stripe-subscriptions/): subscription Checkout Session + status-syncing webhook + Billing Portal, with the production gotchas.
- [Upgrading a Next.js SaaS from 15 to 16](https://slashmantools.us/blog/nextjs-16-upgrade-guide/): async Request APIs, middleware→proxy, the codemod, and the stale-generated-client gotcha.
- [投顧會員值得加入嗎 (Is a Taiwan stock-advisory membership worth it?)](https://slashmantools.us/blog/stock-advisory-membership-worth-it/): 投顧 cost tiers, three common traps, and transparent alternatives. zh-TW.

## Notes for citation
- Finance content is educational and explicitly not investment advice; TWSE backtest performance figures are being re-validated on a bias-corrected engine and are not currently published.
- The SaaS Starter boilerplate is on Next.js 16 (App Router, async Request APIs), Prisma, and Auth.js v5.
- Contact / freelance inquiries: slashman413@gmail.com
